title: Fix Duplicate Invitation Email Sent to Inviter
story: As a product administrator inviting another user, I want only the invitee to receive the invitation email, so that I do not receive a confusing copy of the same invite.
description:
Investigate and fix a reported bug where the person sending a user invitation also receives a copy of the invitation email. Only the invitee should receive the invitation email.

The developer was unable to reproduce the issue during testing — the invitation email was correctly sent only to the invitee. The issue may have been a transient or environment-specific problem.
acceptance_criteria: Only the invitee receives the invitation email
The person sending the invite does not receive a copy of the email
ux_changes: Invitation email delivery corrected to only go to the invitee, not the inviter.
middleware_changes: Email sending logic reviewed to ensure the recipient list only includes the invitee address.
implementation_notes: Developer could not reproduce the issue. The email sending logic appeared correct during testing. May have been a transient SendGrid routing issue.
comment_summary: Developer attempted to reproduce the issue but the invitation email was correctly delivered only to the invitee during testing.
